youtube.text:
And today, history was written by Bosnia and Herzegovina. 🇧🇦

Kerim Alajbegović scored a goal that will be remembered forever. At only 18 years and 276 days old, he became the youngest player in World Cup history to score from outside the penalty area, breaking the record previously held by one of the biggest stars of world football, Kylian Mbappé.

But this is not only about a record. This is about a young Bosnian boy putting the name of Bosnia and Herzegovina among the greatest football stories in the world.

He is now also among the youngest goalscorers in FIFA World Cup history, ranking 8th on the all-time list.

The list of youngest World Cup scorers includes legends:

Pelé 🇧🇷 — 17 years, 239 days
Manuel Rosas 🇲🇽 — 18 years, 93 days
Gavi 🇪🇸 — 18 years, 110 days
Ibrahim Mbaye 🇸🇳 — 18 years, 143 days
Michael Owen 🏴 — 18 years, 190 days
Nicolae Kovács 🇷🇴 — 18 years, 197 days
Dmitri Sychev 🇷🇺 — 18 years, 231 days
Kerim Alajbegović 🇧🇦 — 18 years, 276 days

From a country of only a few million people, a new name has entered football history.

This is Bosnia. This is our pride. This is the heart of a nation that believes, fights, and dreams.

Congratulations Kerim. The world has heard your name. 🇧🇦❤️

Igrajte srcem za grb Bosne i Hercegovine, ali i mudro. Katar je tehnički kvalitetna ekipa koja kažnjava svaku grešku. Budite disciplinovani u odbrani, kompaktni u sredini terena i brzi u tranziciji. Vjerujte jedni drugima, borite se za svaku loptu i ne odustajte ni jednog trenutka. Pobjede se ne grade samo talentom nego zajedništvom, karakterom i vjerom u uspjeh. Nosite dres Bosne i Hercegovine s ponosom. Kada srce, znanje i borbenost budu na istoj strani, nijedan protivnik nije nepobjediv.
